section_en: Preparations with which liqueurs are composed

ingredients.name_it: acqua distillata tripla di fiori d'arancio

steps_en: Melt 10 kg of refined sugar in 2.6 liters of pure water and 1.2 liters of albuminous water.
Heat and clarify as described previously.
After straining the syrup through wool, add 1 liter of previously filtered triple-distilled orange flower water.
notes_en: An alternative, more delicate method (2°): cold-dissolve 1900 parts white sugar in 100 parts distilled orange flower water and filter through paper. The finished syrup should read 36° (Baumé) when cold.

section_en: Preparations with which liqueurs are composed

ingredients.note: same proportions as orange blossom syrup

steps_en: Prepared in exactly the same manner as the preceding orange blossom syrup, substituting rose water for orange flower water.

section_en: Preparations with which liqueurs are composed
steps_en: Infuse 350 g of Canada maidenhair fern in 3.6 liters of boiling water for 2 hours.
Strain through cheesecloth and clarify with albuminous water.
When the syrup reads 31° hot, pour it boiling over 150 g of fresh maidenhair fern placed in a vessel and let infuse again for 2 hours.
Strain through wool, using paper pulp as filter aid.
Optionally add 25-50 g of Pecco tea to make the syrup more aromatic.

section_en: Preparations with which liqueurs are composed

ingredients.name_it: alcoolato di cedro o limoni concentrato

steps_en: Dissolve and heat to boiling the sugar and water, clarifying with albuminous water (1 egg white).
Reduce the syrup to 32° (Baumé), straining it hot through wool.
Add 10 cl of concentrated lemon or citron alcoholate and a solution of 80 g citric acid in 200 cc water.
Mix everything thoroughly and pour, still warm, into the bottles in which it will be stored.
Cork the bottles only after complete cooling.
notes_en: Citric acid may be replaced with tartaric acid, using double the dose.

section_en: Preparations with which liqueurs are composed
title_en: Orange, or Bitter Orange Peel Syrup

ingredients.name_it: tintura di scorze fresche o alcoolaturo
ingredients.name_en: tincture of fresh orange peel or alcoholature

steps_en: Prepared following the same procedure and using the same doses as for lemon syrup, substituting the concentrated lemon alcoholate with the corresponding orange alcoholates, and using a tincture of fresh peel or an alcoholature of bitter orange peel.
notes_en: Refers back to the lemon/citron syrup recipe for proportions and method.

section_en: Preparations with which liqueurs are composed
steps_en: For every kilogram of raspberries, add 20 g of sugar.
Then press and allow the juice to undergo further fermentation in a cool place, until sediment forms.
notes_en: Recipe text is cut off at the bottom of the page and continues onto the next page.
